gitCommit.subject: fix: add YouTube/Vimeo fallback when Cloudflare Stream fails (BUG #5)
gitCommit.body:
fix: add YouTube/Vimeo fallback when Cloudflare Stream fails (BUG #5)

FASE 5: 827 videos have a YouTube/Vimeo source in url_original but the
fallback was unreachable because cloudflareId was always present
(url_stream is always populated). Now:
- fallbackEmbedSrc derives the correct embed URL (Vimeo vs YouTube via url_original)
- useFallback state activates the iframe fallback when PromoFlixPlayer
  reports an unrecoverable error
- SPOT videos (Vimeo) now use player.vimeo.com instead of youtube.com/embed
- useFallback resets when switching videos in multi-video galleries
